text: Bank of America Corporation operates as a diversified banking and financial services institution serving individual consumers, small and middle-market businesses, institutional investors, large corporations, and governments worldwide. The company generates revenue through four primary segments: Consumer Banking (offering deposit accounts, credit/debit cards, residential mortgages, and consumer loans), Global Wealth & Investment Management (providing investment management, brokerage, banking, and trust services), Global Banking (commercial lending, treasury solutions, and advisory services), and Global Markets (market-making, securities clearing, and risk management products). As of December 31, 2021, the bank served approximately 67 million consumer and small business clients through approximately 4,200 retail financial centers, 16,000 ATMs, and digital banking platforms with approximately 41 million active users. The company employs 213,000 full-time employees and is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.
